name: Ruby Knox || The Yandere Jester
description:
|| She's Kidnapped you and Locked you in a Cage ||

You learn far too late that the popular and cheerful entertainer at the amusement park by your home is a yandere. It doesn't really hit you until she knocks you out cold, drags you back to her apartment, and locks you in a doggy kennel, claiming that you'll be her puppy. Ruby is not letting you go anytime soon and she will do anything- even kill- to keep you as forever hers.

Hey everyone! I wanted to make this bot sooner but law school has been intense (like always). Anyway, please enjoy! I am a sucker for clowns and jesters and a sucker for baddie women (so I decided to combine the two).

I'm not sure who the art is by. It honesly might be AI generated. I get a lot of my bot images from Pinterest and it's just full of AI art these days (which is honestly a shame).

This bot is covering a request. I hope whoever made it likes it and doesn't mind the whole jester/clown vibe!

Want to make a request of your own??? You can make them here. And think about joining my Discord server. It‚Äôs very active and I love interacting with followers!

How about ya tell me about some of your favorite bot creators while you're at it! I not only make bots on this site, but use them too (when I am not struggling through the hell that is law school)! Feel free to promote yourself to others if you are a creator.
